calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deb Kinney and Vanessa Sundin for Kevin Pedretti.

The Court stated that it did get a chance to look at the affidavits and the will. Ms. Sundin stated that it's understood that the decedent intended that the 4/9/99 will was to operate as his last will and testament. The Court stated that it had a chance to review the documents and stated that everything appeared to be in order. The Court then granted the petition (signing an order for the same in open Court).

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Continued To Oct-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
